validation_evidence.description: Create _uswds-theme.scss with all 5 theme family grade mappings (primary/blue-warm, secondary/mint-cool, accent-cool/blue, accent-warm/green-warm, base/gray-cool) including Tech Teal as accent-cool-dark
validation_evidence.detail: All 6 primary grades, 6 secondary grades, 6 accent-cool grades, 6 accent-warm grades, 8 base grades configured

validation_evidence.description: State tokens: error (red-60v), warning (gold-20v), success (mint-cool-30v), info (blue-30v), disabled (gray-cool-20) with dark/lighter variants
validation_evidence.detail: All 5 state tokens with dark and lighter variants configured

validation_evidence.description: Link and focus colors: $theme-link-color blue-30v, $theme-link-visited-color blue-30v, $theme-focus-color blue-40v
validation_evidence.detail: Link color, visited color, and focus color configured

validation_evidence.description: 8 unused grades set to false per Decision D5
validation_evidence.detail: primary-lightest, primary-darkest, secondary-lightest, secondary-darkest, accent-cool-lightest, accent-cool-darkest, accent-warm-lightest, accent-warm-darkest
